summary: Login Screen Testing Complete - All 27 backend tests and 12 frontend tests PASSED (100% success rate). Email+Password login, Google OAuth integration, and all UI elements verified and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All testIDs are correctly implemented on interactive elements
Dark theme colors correctly applied (#0F172A background, #F5A623 accent)
Official logo loaded via require('../../assets/logo.png') - working correctly
Google OAuth integration follows Emergent Auth pattern correctly (no hardcoded URLs)
Backend POST /api/auth/google/session correctly verifies session_id with Emergent Auth API
Email+Password login fully functional with proper JWT token generation
All authentication endpoints properly secured and returning correct status codes
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded users: marco@test.com / password123, admin@fantapronostic.com / admin123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login screen is fully functional. All UI elements present with correct testIDs. Email+Password login works perfectly (redirects to home with 'Ciao, Marco_FP' greeting). Google OAuth button correctly redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with proper redirect URL. Backend Google session endpoint (POST /api/auth/google/session) correctly validates session_id and returns 401 for invalid sessions. Dark theme applied correctly. No issues found.

coverage: Email+Password login with seeded users (marco@test.com, admin@fantapronostic.com)
Google session endpoint without session_id returns 400
Google session endpoint with invalid session_id returns 401
Google session endpoint with empty session_id returns 400
All auth endpoints accessible and returning correct status codes

Email input present with correct placeholder and icon
Password input present with correct placeholder, icon, and secure entry
Eye icon toggle button present and tappable
Text 'Password dimenticata?' displayed correctly in orange accent color
Button displays 'ACCEDI' text in uppercase with orange background

Button displays 'Continua con Google' text with Google icon

Successfully logged in with marco@test.com/password123, redirected to /home, greeting 'Ciao, Marco_FP' detected
Clicking Google button correctly redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with redirect URL parameter

additional_notes: All backend API endpoints tested and working correctly
Google OAuth integration follows Emergent Auth pattern (no hardcoded URLs, correct redirect parameter)
Backend correctly verifies session_id with Emergent Auth API at https://demobackend.emergentagent.com/auth/v1/env/oauth/session-data
All React Native components using correct testID attributes for automated testing
Mobile-first design working correctly (390x844 viewport tested)
No console errors related to authentication or UI rendering
Dark mode theme colors correctly applied throughout login screen
